name: First Union Lending
description_short: First Union Lending offers multiple business financing options including term loans, SBA loans, lines of credit, and equipment financing for established U.S. businesses with 600+ credit scores.
description_long:
First Union Lending is a business financing company that has been operating for over 16 years and claims to have funded more than $1 billion in business loans. The company holds an A+ rating with the BBB and reports hundreds of 5-star reviews from business owners. They position themselves as a one-stop financing platform that simplifies the borrowing process for small to mid-sized businesses across the United States.

The company offers nine customized funding products: Business Term Loans, SBA Loans, Business Lines of Credit, Equipment Loans, Invoice Factoring, and Credit Card Processing services. Their application process is designed to be straightforward—applicants provide basic business information, submit a quick application, and then select from available loan options. First Union emphasizes that applying does not affect credit scores and that they can fund loans in as little as 24 hours. They maintain dedicated underwriters to help match borrowers with appropriate loan products.

First Union distinguishes itself through its stated speed of funding (24 hours or less), the variety of nine financing options available through a single application, and personalized service highlighted by testimonials mentioning specific loan officers. The company was recognized by ConsumerAffairs and the Orlando Sentinel as one of the Best Business Loan Companies. Their minimum requirements are straightforward: U.S.-based businesses with at least six months operating history, $20,000 in monthly bank deposits, and a 600+ credit score.

Potential borrowers should note that while the website emphasizes ease and speed, specific terms, rates, and APR information are not disclosed on the site. The company requires established business history (no startups) and relatively substantial monthly cash flow ($20,000+), which excludes many small businesses. Like most business lenders, approval depends on credit evaluation and underwriting, despite claims that the application doesn't affect credit scores.
pros: Can fund loans in as little as 24 hours according to website claims
Nine different financing products available through a single application
A+ BBB rating with reported hundreds of 5-star reviews
No credit score impact from application process
Dedicated underwriters assigned to help find appropriate loan options
Over 16 years in business with $1 billion+ in funded loans
Low minimum requirements (6 months in business, $20K monthly deposits, 600+ credit score)
cons: Specific APR rates, fees, and terms are not disclosed on the website
Requires $20,000 in monthly bank deposits, excluding many small businesses with lower cash flow
Six-month minimum business history requirement excludes startup companies
No information about prepayment penalties or loan term flexibility
Testimonials are limited and do not disclose loan amounts or actual terms received
best_for: Established small to mid-sized businesses needing quick capital access
Business owners with $20K+ monthly revenue seeking equipment or working capital financing
Companies considering multiple financing options and wanting to compare through one application
B2B companies with unpaid invoices interested in invoice factoring solutions
diagnosis: First Union Lending is best for established businesses with consistent monthly revenue ($20K+) and solid credit (600+) seeking multiple financing options in one application with stated fast turnaround. The main caveat is that specific rates, terms, and fees are not provided on their website, making it impossible to evaluate actual cost before application, and the $20K monthly deposit requirement excludes many genuine small businesses.
services: Business Term Loans with flexible repayment intervals (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)
SBA Loans with flexible rates and terms
Business Lines of Credit for flexible cash access
Equipment Loans for purchasing, replacing, or upgrading business equipment
Invoice Factoring to convert unpaid invoices into immediate cash
Credit Card Processing with AI-powered back-office automation
Fixed or floating interest rate options
Online application process with dedicated underwriter review
meta_description: First Union Lending offers term loans, SBA loans, lines of credit, and equipment financing for established U.S. businesses with 600+ credit scores.
